name: Palantir Technologies Inc.
summary: Palantir Technologies Inc. builds software platforms that empower organizations to integrate data, decisions, and operations at scale. Founded in 2003, the company develops four principal platforms: Palantir Gotham (defense and intelligence operations), Palantir Foundry (data operations), Palantir Apollo (continuous delivery and infrastructure management), and AIP (generative AI platform). Palantir serves both government agencies, including the intelligence community and defense organizations, and commercial enterprises across multiple industries.
